message:
feat(tests): add 18 new enrichment integration test suites for asupersync, flow lattice, and specialized subsystems

New test suites covering recently added or expanded engine subsystems:

- asupersync_contract_matrix_integration: validates cross-repo contract
  compatibility surface, version drift detection, and artifact emission
- asupersync_contract_matrix_enrichment_integration: enrichment property
  tests for the contract matrix module
- flow_lattice_enrichment_integration: enrichment tests for Clearance
  can_receive_label, NeverSink Public acceptance, declassification
  sink clearance flow validation
- budgeted_optimization, bulkhead, callback_stdlib_dispatch,
  frankenlab_release_gate, nitrosketch_telemetry,
  observability_channel_model, plas_benchmark_bundle,
  proof_specialization_linkage, revocation_freshness,
  security_conformance, semantic_twin_state_space, slot_differential,
  static_analysis_graph, threshold_signing, tropical_semiring:
  enrichment integration suites with property-based and edge-case
  coverage for each respective subsystem

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
